name: Dutch Bros Inc.
business: Dutch Bros operates and franchises drive-thru shops that serve hand-crafted beverages, including coffee, energy drinks, teas, lemonades, and smoothies, to consumers via drive-thru and walk-up windows.

exposures.sentence: Dutch Bros is a high growth operator and franchisor of drive-thru shops that focus on serving high- QUALITY, hand-crafted beverages with unparalleled SPEED and superior SERVICE.
In 2024, we launched order ahead functionality within our Dutch Rewards app.

catalysts.sentence: Food - expand food offering in 2026 to better address customer needs in the critical morning daypart.
The total capital expenditures for 2026 are estimated to be approximately $270 million to $290 million.
